files_changed: backend/app/lib/db.py (added no_go_reason + confidence columns to NoDiveLabel and OperatorVerification)
backend/app/api/schemas.py (VerifyRequest + VerifyResponse + LabelEntry accept/surface new fields)
backend/app/api/services.py (submit_verification persists new fields, defaults reason='other' for non-dive, confidence='med'; date coercion for ISO strings; get_labels surfaces new fields)
frontend/src/pages/Verify.jsx (new 'Main reason' + 'Confidence' Selects in dialog; new columns in recent observations table; ConfidencePill component)

new_schema.no_go_reason: literal: viz | current | swell | weather | boat | other (nullable)
new_schema.confidence: literal: low | med | high (nullable, defaults to 'med')

defaults.verdict_no_go_reason_default: other (when verdict != 'dive' and operator didn't supply a reason)
defaults.verdict_dive_no_go_reason: stays None (training signal not needed for clean dives)

bugs_found_and_fixed_in_phase_5.issue: Pydantic model_dump() serialises datetime.date as an ISO string, but the SQLAlchemy Date column rejects strings — submit_verification failed at ORM insertion
bugs_found_and_fixed_in_phase_5.fix: submit_verification now coerces the date field back to a datetime.date if it was passed as a string

bugs_found_and_fixed_in_phase_5.issue: Test_get_labels_surfaces_new_fields assumed DB state persisted across tests, but conftest wipes the DB between tests
bugs_found_and_fixed_in_phase_5.fix: Test now inserts a row before querying, so it doesn't depend on prior state

next_phase: Phase 6 — Scrape + crowdsource data flywheel (DiveViz / viz-app.com / PAGASA / dive shop social)
